raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/year> - XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX {$150.00} I made this purchase with XXXX XXXX and cancelled this flight within 24 hours. I spoke to a representative with XXXX XXXX and he assured me that I could cancel the flight online and Id receive a full refund back to the original payment method because it's been booked and cancelled within 24 hours and I cancelled it because I was promised a full refund. Turns out XXXX XXXX issued a full e-credit refund and not back to the original payment method. I tried resolving this with XXXX and they refused to take back the e-credits for a full refund. I disputed with American Express and they sided with XXXX XXXX. I don't know what else to do at this point.
